text: Stepping into this bright, modern space, I am filled with anticipation and a sense of possibility. The clean lines and glass invite me in, hinting at knowledge waiting to unfold. Upon entering the 'R+D' room, I am drawn to the dialogue between technology and human thought. Words about curiosity, reflection, and even unease resonate amid the colorful displays and glowing screens. I feel both small and expansive—keenly aware that I am part of a continuum of seekers, pondering our place in an increasingly technologized world. This inspires both wonder and introspection.
